title: Clear the Space Around Your Home
description: Clear the first metres around your home before fire season so wind-blown embers have nothing to catch. A weekend of work that lowers your risk.

title: Make a One-Page Wildfire Evacuation Plan
description: Build a one-page household wildfire evacuation plan: two ways out, a meeting place, an out-of-area contact, and a plan for pets and livestock.

title: How Helicopters Fight Wildfires in Canada
description: How helicopters fight wildfires in Canada: who runs the response, how aerial crews work as a group, and why Saskatchewan hires its choppers under contract.

title: Pack a Wildfire Go-Bag
description: What goes in a 72-hour wildfire go-bag, room by room, so your household can be out the door in minutes when the order to leave comes.

title: When a Wildfire Nears Your Home, Leave Early
description: A calm, step-by-step plan for the hours before a wildfire reaches your street: harden the house, load the car, and know your trigger to leave.

title: Keep Wildfire Smoke Out of Your House
description: Keep wildfire smoke out of your house: seal the gaps, build a clean-air room, and run a box-fan filter when the air outside turns brown.
